en: Then the LORD said to me, "Take a large tablet and write on it in common characters, 'Belonging to Maher-shalal-hashbaz.'
zh: 耶和華對我說：“你拿一塊大版，用通用的文字寫上‘瑪黑珥．沙拉勒．哈施．罷斯’ 。

en: And I will get reliable witnesses, Uriah the priest and Zechariah the son of Jeberechiah, to attest for me."
zh: 我要叫兩個誠實的見證人，就是烏利亞祭司和耶比利家的兒子撒迦利亞，來為我作見證。”

en: And I went to the prophetess, and she conceived and bore a son. Then the LORD said to me, "Call his name Maher-shalal-hashbaz;
zh: 我親近了女先知，就是我妻子，她就懷孕生子。耶和華對我說：“給他起名叫‘瑪黑珥．沙拉勒．哈施．罷斯’，

en: for before the boy knows how to cry 'My father' or 'My mother,' the wealth of Damascus and the spoil of Samaria will be carried away before the king of Assyria."
zh: 因為在這孩子曉得喊叫父母以先，大馬士革的財寶和撒瑪利亞的擄物，必在亞述王面前被搬了去。”

en: The LORD spoke to me again:
zh: 耶和華又再告訴我說：

en: "Because this people have refused the waters of Shiloah that flow gently, and rejoice over Rezin and the son of Remaliah,
zh: “這子民既然厭棄了西羅亞緩流的水， 卻喜悅利汛和利瑪利的兒子，

en: therefore, behold, the Lord is bringing up against them the waters of the River, mighty and many, the king of Assyria and all his glory. And it will rise over all its channels and go over all its banks,
zh: 因此，主必使大河又強又大的水臨到他們， 就是亞述王和他一切威榮， 水必漲起來，高過所有的水道；水要氾濫，漫過所有的河岸；

en: and it will sweep on into Judah, it will overflow and pass on, reaching even to the neck, and its outspread wings will fill the breadth of your land, O Immanuel."
zh: 然後必沖入猶大，漲溢氾濫， 直到頸項， 以馬內利啊！它展開的翅膀必遮遍你廣闊的地土。”

en: Be broken, you peoples, and be shattered; give ear, all you far countries; strap on your armor and be shattered; strap on your armor and be shattered.
zh: 列國之民啊！你們儘管作惡，但你們終必毀滅！ 所有在遠處的人民啊，要留心聽！ 你們儘管束腰吧，你們終必毀滅！ 你們儘管束腰吧，你們終必毀滅！

en: Take counsel together, but it will come to nothing; speak a word, but it will not stand, for God is with us.
zh: 你們儘管計劃陰謀吧，這些終必失敗； 你們儘管提議吧，這些終必不能成立， 因為 神與我們同在。

en: For the LORD spoke thus to me with his strong hand upon me, and warned me not to walk in the way of this people, saying:
zh: 耶和華以大能的手托住我，教導我不要走這子民所走的道路；他對我這樣說：

en: "Do not call conspiracy all that this people calls conspiracy, and do not fear what they fear, nor be in dread.
zh: “這子民所稱為陰謀的，你們都不要稱為陰謀； 他們所怕的，你們不要怕，也不要畏懼。

en: But the LORD of hosts, him you shall regard as holy. Let him be your fear, and let him be your dread.
zh: 你們要尊萬軍之耶和華為聖， 他是你們當怕的， 也是你們當畏懼的。

en: And he will become a sanctuary and a stone of offense and a rock of stumbling to both houses of Israel, a trap and a snare to the inhabitants of Jerusalem.
zh: 他必向信靠他的人作聖所， 卻向以色列兩家作絆腳的石頭、跌人的磐石； 又向耶路撒冷的居民作陷阱和網羅。

en: And many shall stumble on it. They shall fall and be broken; they shall be snared and taken."
zh: 許多人必在其上絆跌、仆倒、跌碎， 並且陷入網羅被捉住。”

en: Bind up the testimony; seal the teaching among my disciples.
zh: 你要捲起律法書，在我的門徒中間封住訓誨。

en: I will wait for the LORD, who is hiding his face from the house of Jacob, and I will hope in him.
zh: 我要等候那掩面不顧雅各家的耶和華，我要仰視他。

en: Behold, I and the children whom the LORD has given me are signs and portents in Israel from the LORD of hosts, who dwells on Mount Zion.
zh: 看哪！我和耶和華賜給我的孩子，在以色列中作預兆與奇蹟，都是從住在錫安山的萬軍之耶和華來的。

en: And when they say to you, "Inquire of the mediums and the necromancers who chirp and mutter," should not a people inquire of their God? Should they inquire of the dead on behalf of the living?
zh: 有人對你們說：“要求問那些交鬼的和行巫術的，就是那些喃喃細語的人。”一族之民不應當求問自己的 神嗎？他們怎能為活人求問死人呢？

en: To the teaching and to the testimony! If they will not speak according to this word, it is because they have no dawn.
zh: 他們應當求問 神的訓誨和法度；他們若不照著這些準則說話，就見不到曙光。

en: They will pass through the land, greatly distressed and hungry. And when they are hungry, they will be enraged and will speak contemptuously against their king and their God, and turn their faces upward.
zh: 他們必經過這地，受困迫、受飢餓；他們飢餓的時候，就惱怒，咒罵自己的王和自己的 神；

en: And they will look to the earth, but behold, distress and darkness, the gloom of anguish. And they will be thrust into thick darkness.
zh: 他們仰臉向天觀望，又俯視大地，只見困苦、黑暗、可怕的幽暗；他們必被趕入幽黑的黑暗中。
